name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement

labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Scope

- [ ] Viewer reading experience
- [ ] Sharing / OGP
- [ ] Official curation
- [ ] CMS editing
- [ ] Content schema
- [ ] Ingestion
- [ ] Translation / packs
- [ ] Operations

## Non-goals

What should this not try to solve yet?

## References

Link to relevant docs, screenshots, examples, or prior discussion.
